arts.ttl: Liverpool could potentially be set to do Man United a big favour in the transfer market
arts.sum: Liverpool misfit Federico Chiesa is reportedly an option Napoli are considering in the transfer market in case they end up losing Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. Chiesa has struggled for playing time since joining Liverpool from Juventus in the summer, but he previously looked like an exciting talent during his Serie A days, so it’s not too surprising […] The post Liverpool could potentially be set to do Man United a big favour in the transfer market appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola wanted me to be his new Lionel Messi - I rejected Liverpool to join Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola beat rival Jurgen Klopp to Leroy Sane's signature in 2016 as the German winger quickly became a crucial part of Manchester City's Premier League success

arts.ttl: Inside Man City vs Liverpool as rivalry takes twist amid Jurgen Klopp decision and contract chaos
arts.sum: Manchester City take on a Liverpool side without Jurgen Klopp in charge for the first time since 2015 as the great modern-day rivalry is changing.

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool and Man City supporters are protesting outside Anfield today
arts.sum: Supporters of Liverpool, Everton, Manchester United and Man City will protest outside both Anfield and Old Trafford on Sunday

arts.ttl: Sunday's Premier League predictions including Liverpool vs. Man City
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Liverpool vs. Man City.

arts.ttl: I rejected Liverpool for Man City after Jurgen Klopp phone calls - he was a nice guy
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Leroy Sane admitted he once rejected Liverpool to join Manchester City before going on to play a key role in their Premier League success over the Reds

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man City live stream, TV channel and kick-off time ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester City's trip to Liverpool will be available to watch around the world, with the game set to be broadcasted in Portugal, Spain, Germany and the United States to name a few

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's infamous comments come back to haunt him amid Erling Haaland reality
arts.sum: Manchester City are stuck in a rut, going through their worst spell under Pep Guardiola, and he needs to find a way to overcome their over-reliance on Erling Haaland

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola as you've never heard him before as he lays bare his Man City battles
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola was a talkative and introspective presence during a 30-minute press conference as he discussed the difficult run of form Manchester City have been on.

arts.ttl: Liverpool breathe sigh of relief after £45m transfer collapsed and Real Madrid horror show
arts.sum: Joe Gomez could be reunited with Virgil van Dijk at centre-back when Liverpool take on Man City at Anfield
